scripts.pack: npm run prepare:runtime-deps && npm run prepare:resources && electron-builder --dir --publish never --config.npmRebuild=false --config.buildDependenciesFromSource=false
scripts.build:linux: npm run prepare:runtime-deps && npm run prepare:resources && electron-builder --linux --x64 --arm64 --publish never --config.npmRebuild=false --config.buildDependenciesFromSource=false
scripts.build:linux:x64: npm run prepare:runtime-deps && npm run prepare:resources && electron-builder --linux --x64 --publish never --config.npmRebuild=false --config.buildDependenciesFromSource=false
scripts.build:linux:arm64: npm run prepare:runtime-deps && npm run prepare:resources && electron-builder --linux --arm64 --publish never --config.npmRebuild=false --config.buildDependenciesFromSource=false
scripts.build: npm run prepare:runtime-deps && npm run prepare:resources && electron-builder --publish never --config.npmRebuild=false --config.buildDependenciesFromSource=false
